project_type: Full-stack WhatsApp Gateway SaaS - Node.js backend with React frontend
build_system: pnpm workspaces with monorepo structure (server + client)
test_framework: Jest for backend, Vitest for frontend
verification_instructions: 1. Run pnpm install at root. 2. Run pnpm run build to compile both server and client. 3. Run pnpm run test to execute all tests. 4. Start dev server and confirm landing page loads at localhost:3000.
setup_instructions: 1. cd /projects/sandbox/WhatsApp-Gateway. 2. pnpm install. 3. Copy .env.example to .env and fill in values. 4. pnpm run dev to start both server and client in dev mode.
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET - full npm access available. Node.js v22, pnpm 10.28.1 available. No Docker daemon needed for development.
contribution_requirements: Greenfield project - no existing contribution guidelines.
key_patterns: Monorepo with /server (Express + Baileys) and /client (React + Vite). SQLite via better-sqlite3 for simplicity. JWT for auth. WhatsApp sessions stored on filesystem.
directory_structure: /projects/sandbox/WhatsApp-Gateway/ - root with pnpm workspaces. /server - Express backend with Baileys WhatsApp integration. /client - React frontend with Vite. /server/src/sessions/ - WhatsApp session storage directory.
